Class ReportHandler

java.lang.Object
handlers.ReportHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
ResponseHandler
public class ReportHandler extends Object implements ResponseHandler
Handles server responses related to reports and updates JavaFX charts in the ReportController with the received data.

Supports two report types:

  • SCHEDULE: Updates arrival, departure, late arrivals, and delay charts.
  • SUBSCRIBERS: Updates weekly completed reservations and waitlist bar charts.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReportHandler

      public ReportHandler(ReportController controller)

      Parameters:
      controller - the ReportController to update charts in

  • Method Details

    • setController

      public void setController(ReportController controller)
      Sets the controller that this handler will update.
      Parameters:
      controller - the new ReportController

    • handle

      public void handle(Object data)
      Handles the server response for a report. Validates the response and updates the appropriate charts in the controller depending on the report type.
      Specified by:
      handle in interface ResponseHandler
      Parameters:
      data - the server response object containing report data

    • generateSlots

      private List<String> generateSlots()
      Generates all half-hour time slots between 08:00 and 02:30.
      Returns:
      a list of formatted time slots

    • mapToHalfHourSlot

      private String mapToHalfHourSlot(LocalTime time)
      Maps a LocalTime to its corresponding half-hour slot string.
      Parameters:
      time - the time to map
      Returns:
      the formatted half-hour slot string

    • applySeriesColors

      private void applySeriesColors(javafx.scene.chart.XYChart.Series<String,Number> series, String colorHex)
      Applies a color to all bars in a given XYChart series.
      Parameters:
      series - the series to style
      colorHex - the color to apply in hex format

    • setLegendColors

      private void setLegendColors(javafx.scene.chart.XYChart<String,Number> chart, String colorHex)
      Sets the legend color of a chart to match the series color.
      Parameters:
      chart - the chart whose legend to style
      colorHex - the color to apply in hex format

    • handleScheduleReport

      private void handleScheduleReport(Report report)
      Handles the schedule report type and updates relevant charts.
      Parameters:
      report - the schedule report to process

    • handleSubscribersReport

      private void handleSubscribersReport(Report report)
      Handles the subscribers report type and updates relevant bar charts.
      Parameters:
      report - the subscribers report to process
